sections.paragraph: m., collected, adj. diminutive; whence contemptuously, a mixed crowd, scraped together of men of all kinds, colluvies, who added themselves to the Israelites; Gefindel (which word is itself a diminutive used in contempt). With article הָאסַפְסֻף Num 11:4, Aleph quiescent. The same are called in Exo 12:38, עֵרֶב רַב.
